# DrinkedIn

> Parody social platform for corporate workers — anonymous workplace confessions, one-click viral "Broetry," and verified local happy hours in your tech hub city.

DrinkedIn is a satirical "LinkedIn for after work" feed. Posts are anonymous by default, can be amplified through a Broetry generator, and surface real happy-hour deals from partner pubs.

## Pages

- [Home feed](/): Anonymous post composer, live cheers feed, verified pub deals, and the desperation/hangover meter.
